import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
tree = ET.parse\('C:/Users/Jasha/source/repos/LisereLink/src/Lisere.Tests/TestResults/855de137-89f4-422a-8655-e8d0b74fe81d/coverage.cobertura.xml'\)
root = tree.getroot\(\)
for pkg in root.findall\('.//package'\):
    name = pkg.get\('name'\)
    rate = float\(pkg.get\('line-rate', 0\)\)
    print\(f'{rate*100:5.1f}%  {name}'\)
")
